summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FOMO Arena TG Shell with mobile-first design. All core TG Shell features working correctly including navigation, UI components, and mobile responsiveness.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 instead of 404 for invalid position ID format
minor_issues.impact: Minor - still proper validation, just different status code

issues: Console warnings about demo project ID configuration
design_issues.note: Expected warnings due to demo project configuration

passed_tests: Backend health check (/api/health) returns status ok
Bottom navigation appears with 4 tabs (Arena, Duels, Leaders, Profile)
Top bar displays with FOMO logo and notification bell
Arena page shows market cards with YES/NO buttons
Duels page shows duel cards and Create Duel button
Leaderboard shows top-3 podium and leaderboard list
Profile shows avatar, level, stats, and badges
All buttons are clickable and responsive
Filter tabs work on Arena and Leaderboard pages
No horizontal overflow on mobile viewport
Bottom navigation properly positioned for mobile
Mock data displays correctly across all pages

success_percentage.backend: 86% (6/7 endpoints working, 1 minor status code difference)
